compiled_state.title: [create-dso-app]: fresh-template install never runs project-detect -> CI guard analysis silently skipped, template ci.yml drift goes undetected
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

When running `bash <(curl -fsSL .../create-dso-app.sh)` on a fresh system, dso-setup.sh emits:
```
[skip] No detection output available — skipping CI guard analysis
```

This message is printed because _run_ci_guard_analysis() (dso-setup.sh:233-241) reads $DSO_DETECT_OUTPUT and skips when unset. create-dso-app.sh never runs project detection (it's a fresh-template clone, not existing-project onboarding), so the skip always fires.

## Expected
Either no message (analysis is n/a for fresh templates) or a clearer diagnostic.

## Observed
Users see an unexplained '[skip]' line that looks like an error or missing step.

## Reproducer
bash <(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra/HEAD/scripts/create-dso-app.sh) joe-test

comments.body: Reframed: concern is missing coverage, not UX noise. Re-investigating with focus on (1) what checks are silently skipped, (2) whether template's current ci.yml has lint/test/format guards, (3) correct fix location (installer vs setup vs template repo enforcement).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fix implemented in scripts/create-dso-app.sh: after resolved_plugin_root computation (Step 5b), invokes project-detect.sh, captures stdout to a tmpfile, and exports DSO_DETECT_OUTPUT before dso-setup.sh is called. Cleanup after dso-setup completes. RED test at tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app-populates-detect-output.sh: 3 assertions green (dso-setup invoked, DSO_DETECT_OUTPUT exported, points to non-empty detect file). test-dso-setup.sh full suite: 79/79 green, no regression. Awaiting Bug #2-4 completion before commit.
comments.author: Test
